---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for PriceRecon
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Include:
- High-level description of the change
- How a user would interact with this feature
- Any UI/UX considerations (if applicable)

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why are they less suitable?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## Implementation Notes (Optional)
If you have technical ideas about implementation:
- Which components would need changes?
- Are there any connector-specific considerations?
- Would this require new dependencies?

## Willing to Contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this feature
- [ ] I'd need guidance on implementation
- [ ] No, I'm just proposing the idea
